title: Light Saudi Blueberry Bowl
description: A refreshing, herbal dish using natural blue food coloring for a vibrant hue, designed to be diabetic-friendly with minimal sugar and fermenting for probiotic benefits.

ingredients.name: blue food coloring (natural)
ingredients.notes: use food-safe blue dye for vibrant color without added sugar

ingredients.name: blueberries
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, no added sugar

ingredients.name: fermented date paste
ingredients.notes: made from dates fermented for probiotics (use 1 date, 100ml water, 24h)

instructions: In a bowl, combine 100g blueberries with 2 tbsp chopped mint leaves.
Add 1 tsp natural blue food coloring to the blueberries for color.
Mix in 1 tbsp fermented date paste for probiotic benefits.
Gently stir in 200ml almond milk until smooth.
